generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Your local emergency services are being overwhelmed by unnecessary alerts. While we all want to be prepared, constant false alarms from civil defense drills are draining resources that could be used for real crises. It's time to demand accountability from those pushing excessive preparedness measures. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense #PublicSafety
